text: Passionate about creating intuitive and beautiful user experiences. Love exploring the intersection of design, technology, and human behavior.
Leading design initiatives for enterprise SaaS products, managing a team of 4 designers, and establishing design system standards across the organization.
Designed end-to-end user experiences for mobile and web applications. Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver high-impact features that increased user engagement by 40%.
Conducted user research and usability testing to inform product decisions. Created wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity designs for various client projects.
Specialized in Human-Computer Interaction and Design Thinking
Rhode Island School of Design • Providence, RI
Major in Graphic Design with honors
A comprehensive health and fitness tracking application that helps users monitor their daily activities, nutrition, and wellness goals. Designed with accessibility and user engagement in mind.
Complete overhaul of a B2B analytics platform, focusing on data visualization and user workflow optimization. Increased user satisfaction by 45% and reduced task completion time.
Modern shopping experience for a fashion retail brand. Implemented a seamless checkout process and personalized product recommendations that increased conversion rates by 30%.
Developed a comprehensive design system and brand guidelines for a fintech startup. Created reusable components and documentation to ensure consistency across all touchpoints.
